scripts.build:pi-gui-packages: bun run --cwd packages/pi-gui-session-driver build && bun run --cwd packages/pi-gui-catalogs build && bun run --cwd packages/pi-gui-pi-sdk-driver build
scripts.setup: bun install && bun run --cwd desktop rebuild
scripts.dev: bun run build:pi-gui-packages && bun run --cwd desktop dev
scripts.build: bun run build:pi-gui-packages && bun run --cwd desktop build
